name: sast-xss
description: Detect Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in a codebase using a three-phase approach: recon (find HTML/JS/DOM sink sites), batched verify (trace user input to sinks in parallel subagents, 3 sink sites each), and merge (consolidate batch results). Requires sast/architecture.md (run sast-analysis first). Outputs findings to sast/xss-results.md. Use when asked to find XSS or cross-site scripting bugs.
